sources.name: arXiv Preprint Server
sources.query: ("toroidal vortex" OR "superfluid vacuum" OR "knot soliton" OR "vortex atom" OR "Faddeev-Niemi") AND (cond-mat OR hep-th OR math-ph OR physics.flu-dyn)

sources.name: INSPIRE-HEP
sources.query: find a "Volovik" or a "Sbitnev" or a "Zloshchastiev" or t "Skyrmion Platonic" or t "knot soliton field theory"

sources.name: Web of Science (Clarivate)
sources.query: TS=("crystal symmetry" AND "material property" AND "correlation") OR TS=("quasicrystal" AND "icosahedral" AND "anomalous")

sources.name: Scopus (Elsevier)
sources.query: TITLE-ABS-KEY("space group" AND "property prediction" AND "symmetry") AND SRCTYPE(j)

sources.name: Google Scholar
sources.query: "toroidal vortex" "molecular geometry" OR "Kelvin vortex atom" OR "Williamson van der Mark electron toroidal"

sources.name: MathSciNet (AMS)
sources.query: "knot theory" AND "field theory" AND ("soliton" OR "topological defect")

sources.name: Semantic Scholar (AI2)
sources.query: superfluid vacuum topological defect particle model OR Platonic solid Skyrmion nuclear

sources.name: Materials Project Database
sources.query: API query: spacegroup.number AND properties.magnetic_type AND properties.band_gap AND properties.total_magnetization

sources.name: Inorganic Crystal Structure Database (ICSD)
sources.query: Space group filter: All 230 groups with symmetry subgroup decomposition data

sources.name: AFLOW (Automatic FLOW for Materials Discovery)
sources.query: REST API: species, spacegroup, prototype AND properties (band_gap, magnetic, hardness)

sources.name: Open Quantum Materials Database (OQMD)
sources.query: API query: crystal structure + formation energy + band gap + magnetic moment

sources.name: Pauling File (MPDS)
sources.query: Quasicrystal entries with icosahedral symmetry and measured properties

sources.name: Tokyo Quasicrystal Database
sources.query: All entries: structure type, composition, symmetry, measured properties

sources.name: JSTOR
sources.query: "vortex atom" AND "history" AND ("Kelvin" OR "Thomson") AND "physics"

sources.name: PhilPapers
sources.query: aether OR ether AND physics AND (history OR philosophy) AND NOT cryptocurrency

sources.name: ProQuest Dissertations & Theses
sources.query: superfluid vacuum theory OR vortex topology condensed matter OR Platonic symmetry materials

sources.name: PubMed / MEDLINE
sources.query: "fullerene" OR "C60" OR "icosahedral virus" AND ("topology" OR "symmetry") AND ("stability" OR "structure")

sources.name: CiteSeerX (PSU)
sources.query: "vortex dynamics" AND "knot topology" AND "ideal fluid" AND "stability"

sources.name: bioRxiv (for icosahedral virus capsid literature)
sources.query: icosahedral symmetry virus capsid stability topology

sources.name: NASA Astrophysics Data System (ADS)
sources.query: "dodecahedral" AND ("universe" OR "Poincaré" OR "cosmic topology") AND ("CMB" OR "WMAP" OR "Planck")

sources.name: Crossref Metadata API
sources.query: DOI resolution and citation metadata for all seed papers (Volovik 2003, Battye-Sutcliffe 2002, Williamson-vdMark 1997, etc.)

sources.name: OpenCitations COCI
sources.query: Citation chaining from seed DOIs: 10.1093/acprof:oso/9780198507824 (Volovik), 10.1088/0305-4470/30/4/017 (Williamson-vdMark)

sources.name: CODATA / Landolt-Börnstein
sources.query: Numerical data on magnetic susceptibility, conductivity, hardness, melting point by crystal structure

sources.name: NIST Materials Data Repository
sources.query: Crystal structure + measured thermodynamic, mechanical, electromagnetic properties

sources.name: SpringerMaterials (Landolt-Börnstein)
sources.query: Inorganic compounds with crystal structure data and physical property measurements
